title: Supramax Market Analysis
summary:
Main
Dry Weekly Market Monitor - Week 14, 2025 Snapshot of Spot Freight Rates, Supply-Demand Trends, Port Congestions April 02, 2025
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-04-02 150735.png | assets/2025-04-02_supramax-market-analysis_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_963a79d1fa82.png
Supramax Market Analysis: S8 Route Surges Amidst Tightening Tonnage Supply
Over the past several weeks, the Supramax freight market has witnessed a remarkable recovery, particularly on the Baltic Exchange's S8 route - which covers South China via Indonesia to East Coast India, a key corridor for coal shipments. Recovery Timing:
The recovery in the Supramax market for the S8 route appears to have started in early February 2025. On the left chart, the S8 rate (green line) bottomed out around late January 2025, at approximately $5,797/day, and then began a sharp upward movement into February and March.
